title: isodon calycinus
intro: Isodon calycinus, also known as Chinese isodon, is a type of flowering plant in the mint family, Lamiaceae. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, the plant is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which have been shown to possess medicinal value in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Isodon calycinus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and even exhibit antioxidant effects. Isodon calycinus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or dried extracts, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
